scripts.build: vite build && node scripts/prerender.mjs && touch dist/.nojekyll
scripts.api:deploy: envsubst < api/wrangler.toml > api/wrangler.gen.toml && wrangler deploy --config api/wrangler.gen.toml --var CACHE_VERSION:$(date +%s) STEAM_ID:$STEAM_ID DISCORD_ID:$DISCORD_ID SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID:$SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID SPOTIFY_REFRESH_TOKEN:$SPOTIFY_REFRESH_TOKEN STEAM_API_KEY:$STEAM_API_KEY
